title: ItemLore
description: Lore and per-item usage stat tracking for your tools and items, typically applied after running them through an anvil.
body:
## ItemLore: Customizable Lore and Stat-Tracking for Your Tools

ItemLore is a **Fabric** mod designed to make your favorite anvilled tools and items unique by adding powerful, customizable lore and integrated usage statistics!

Never wonder how many blocks you've mined with your trusty pickaxe or how many mobs you've slain with your legendary sword again. ItemLore makes it easy to track and display this dynamic information right on your items.

### Key Features

* **Dynamic Lore:** Add customizable, dynamic information directly to item tooltips.

* **Per-Tool Stat Tracking:** Record detailed usage statistics for individual items, such as:

  * Blocks broken.

  * Mobs slain.

* **Intuitive Commands:** Easily view your statistics with a simple command, featuring tab-completion:

  * `/stats all` (Show global stats)

  * `/stats blocks` (Show block-related stats)

  * `/stats mobs` (Show mob-related stats)

* **Highly Configurable:** Use the JSON configuration to set default lore templates and fine-tune stat tracking behaviors.

* **Safe & Seamless:** The mod is **fully vanilla-safe**, ensuring **no data loss or corruption**. It can be added to and removed from your instance without any issues.

### Usage

1. **Toggle the Feature:** Use `/toggleItemLore` to toggle the lore and tracking capabilities. (on by default)

2. **Apply Lore:** Use `/applylore` on a held item to give it the lore and begin tracking, or run it through an anvil

3. **Check Your Stats:** View your tools stats anytime using the `/stats ___` commands.

Start giving your items a history with ItemLore!


**License:** LGPL-3.0
